originalAlarm.description: 1st function call argument is an uninitialized value

sanitizedDescription: 1st function call argument is an uninitialized value
reasoning: driver_data is declared at L33 but only assigned at L39 (driver_data = &some_int). The goto err_release at L36 bypasses this assignment, so tty_release(driver_data) at L44 receives an uninitialized pointer. This is a genuine bug in the call chain. No // ERROR at L44 (the // ERROR at L8 marks the downstream *inode dereference, a different alarm). New bug. PC = CONFIG_UNIX98_PTYS correctly captures when the ptmx_open function (containing this path) is compiled. No library macros.
